meta.title: DEF CON 29 ICS Village - Sara Fluchs, Vivek Ponnada - Top 20 Secure PLC Coding Practices
meta.description: This presentation is the outcome of a community driven project called "Top 20 Secure PLC Coding Practices", with document version 1.0 to be released on plc-security.com on June 15th, 2021, for downloading free or charge, and will have no restrictions on distribution and use.
